description_en: Calgary may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 62 halal restaurants and 7 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Calgary, Canada, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Calgary: 85 halal restaurants listed, 7 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
